title: habenaria breviloba
intro: Habenaria breviloba, also known as the Shortlobe Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. Habenaria breviloba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to leverage its medicinal properties.
